name: openalex_works_scraper
title: OpenAlex Works Scraper
description: Search OpenAlex scholarly works or fetch one exact OpenAlex work by ID or DOI through the public OpenAlex API, returning normalized paper metadata, authors, institutions, publication venues, citation counts, open-access links, concepts, topics, and optional abstract text.

seo.title: OpenAlex Works Scraper Tool for Scholarly Metadata
seo.description: Search OpenAlex works or fetch exact OpenAlex IDs and DOIs with Better Fetch via the public OpenAlex API, including titles, authors, affiliations, venues, dates, citation counts, open-access URLs, concepts, topics, and abstracts.
seo.intro: OpenAlex Works Scraper gives agents a public-API route into OpenAlex scholarly work metadata. Search by keyword with optional publication date, year, type, open-access, and raw OpenAlex filters, or fetch a known OpenAlex work ID, DOI, or DOI URL. The tool normalizes OpenAlex JSON into compact paper rows with OpenAlex IDs, DOI URLs, titles, publication dates, authors, ORCIDs, institutions, countries, venues, publishers, citation and reference counts, open-access status, landing pages, PDF URLs, concepts, topics, and reconstructed abstracts when requested. It is designed for literature discovery, bibliometric analysis, RAG corpus triage, open-access harvesting, institution research maps, citation monitoring, and research-agent workflows that need open scholarly metadata without publisher scraping.

useCases.title: Literature discovery
useCases.description: Search OpenAlex works by topic, year range, type, or open-access status, then return normalized papers for review or ranking.

useCases.title: Citation and venue analysis
useCases.description: Fetch citation counts, reference counts, source names, publishers, concepts, topics, and authorship metadata for bibliometric workflows.

useCases.title: RAG corpus triage
useCases.description: Collect OpenAlex IDs, DOI URLs, landing pages, open-access links, PDF URLs, and abstracts before deciding which papers to download or embed.

faqs.question: Does OpenAlex Works Scraper require an API key?
faqs.answer: No. Version 0.1 uses the public OpenAlex API and keeps each run to one bounded request. OpenAlex may enforce request budgets, so high-volume workflows should use OpenAlex's current authentication and pricing guidance directly.

faqs.question: Does it download PDFs or crawl publisher pages?
faqs.answer: No. It returns metadata, landing-page URLs, open-access URLs, and PDF URLs when OpenAlex provides them. It does not download PDFs, parse full text, or scrape publisher websites.

faqs.question: Is this tool affiliated with OpenAlex?
faqs.answer: No. OpenAlex is operated by OurResearch. This Better Fetch tool uses public OpenAlex API data and is not endorsed by or affiliated with OpenAlex or OurResearch.

mode.description: Search OpenAlex works or fetch one exact work.

work_id.description: OpenAlex work ID, OpenAlex URL, DOI, DOI URL, or DOI-prefixed value, e.g. W2919115771, https://openalex.org/W2919115771, 10.1038/nature14539, or https://doi.org/10.1038/nature14539.

query.description: Keyword query for OpenAlex works search.

filter.description: Optional raw OpenAlex filter expression, e.g. type:article,authorships.institutions.country_code:US.

from_publication_date.description: Earliest publication date filter in YYYY, YYYY-MM, or YYYY-MM-DD format.

to_publication_date.description: Latest publication date filter in YYYY, YYYY-MM, or YYYY-MM-DD format.

type.description: OpenAlex work type such as article, preprint, book-chapter, or dataset.

is_open_access.description: Filter search results to open-access or closed works.

per_page.description: Maximum works to return in search mode.

sort.description: OpenAlex sort expression for search mode.

include_abstract.description: Reconstruct abstract text from OpenAlex inverted-index abstracts when available.

total_matches.description: Total OpenAlex matches reported by the API
